fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number that the comment line refers to.
The program fills in this field with the routing number from the Routing No. field on the routing line.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that the comment refers to.
The program fills in this field with the operation number from the Operation No. field on the routing line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the comment line.
When you create a comment for a routing line, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the comment table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the version code of the routing line that the comment line refers to.
The program fills in this field with the version code from the Version Code field on the routing line.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comments.
